title: Error
description: Error object which contains details about a single error.

Source.description: The application name that generated this error. If an error is generated and returned by the gateway, then this field will have value as `Gateway`. Other possible values are `CARBON CALCULATOR`, `DONATE`, `CARBON_CALCULATOR_EXPERIENCE` or `PRICELESS PLANET`.

ReasonCode.description: A unique constant identifying the error case encountered during request processing.

Recoverable.description: Indicates whether this error will always be returned for this request, or retrying could change the outcome.

Details.description: (Optional) Where appropriate, indicates detailed information about data received and calculated during the request processing, to help the user with diagnosing errors.
